input: We spend $45K/month on SaaS tools across 38 subscriptions. How do I find redundancies and unused licenses?

Our AWS bill jumped 30% last quarter but revenue only grew 10%. How do I analyze cloud cost overruns?
How do I prioritize which expenses to cut when we need to extend runway by 6 months?
We identified $200K in potential annual savings 3 months ago but only realized $40K. How do I track savings realization?
